calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demands For The Production And Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And First Set Of Form Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Amy Shearer; Declaration Of Tracy Sacca; [Proposed Order] (15-130)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tracy Sacca, 415-553-1814 Paralegal.Investigative Assistant of the Office of the District ATtorney for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demands For The Production And Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And First Set Of Form Interrogatories.

The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
